phrases.text_local: Onde está a máquina de cartão?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH MAH-kee-nuh DIH kuh-ruh-TOWN?

likely_response.local: A máquina de cartão está no balcão.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH MAH-kee-nuh DIH kuh-ruh-TOWN ehs-TAH NOO bahl-KOWN.
likely_response.translation_en: The card machine is on the counter.

responses.english: The card machine is on the counter.
responses.phonetic: AH MAH-kee-nuh DIH kuh-ruh-TOWN ehs-TAH NOO bahl-KOWN.
responses.french: A máquina de cartão está no balcão.

phrases.text_local: Você pode me indicar um bom restaurante aqui perto?
phrases.pronunciation: voh-SEH PAW-dih MIH een-dee-KAHR OONNG BOHNG rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih uh-KEE PEHR-too?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao garçom; ele conhece bem os restaurantes da área.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW guh-ruh-SOHNG; EH-lih koo-NYEH-sih BAYNG OOSH rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tihsh DUH AH-reeuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the waiter; he knows the restaurants in the area well.

responses.english: Ask the waiter; he knows the restaurants in the area well.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW guh-ruh-SOHNG; EH-lih koo-NYEH-sih BAYNG OOSH rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tihsh DUH AH-reeuh.
responses.french: Pergunte ao garçom; ele conhece bem os restaurantes da área.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar os pastéis de nata?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR OOSH puhsh-TEHEESH DIH NAH-tuh?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao nosso garçom ou ao dono da casa; eles podem indicar onde estão os pastéis de nata.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW NAW-soo guh-ruh-SOHNG OHW OW DOH-noo DUH KAH-zuh; EH-lihsh PAW-dayng een-dee-KAHR OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN OOSH puhsh-TEHEESH DIH NAH-tuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask our waiter or the owner; they can point out where the pastéis de nata are.

responses.english: Ask our waiter or the owner; they can point out where the pastéis de nata are.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW NAW-soo guh-ruh-SOHNG OHW OW DOH-noo DUH KAH-zuh; EH-lihsh PAW-dayng een-dee-KAHR OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN OOSH puhsh-TEHEESH DIH NAH-tuh.
responses.french: Pergunte ao nosso garçom ou ao dono da casa; eles podem indicar onde estão os pastéis de nata.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the pastry display case is
phrases.text_local: Olá, onde está a vitrine de pastéis?
phrases.pronunciation: aw-LAH, OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH veet-REE-nih DIH puhsh-TEHEESH?
phrases.cultural_note: Pastry display cases are usually near the counter in Portuguese cafés.

likely_response.local: Perto do balcão, à sua esquerda.
likely_response.pronunciation: PEHR-too DOO bahl-KOWN, AH SOOUH SHKEH-ruh-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: Near the counter, on your left.

responses.english: Near the counter, on your left.
responses.phonetic: PEHR-too DOO bahl-KOWN, AH SOOUH SHKEH-ruh-duh.
responses.french: Perto do balcão, à sua esquerda.
